hero.title: Software that adapts to your business, not the other way around
hero.subtitle: We build custom systems, web applications and digital solutions for companies that need more than a template.

items.title: Management systems
items.desc: ERP, CRM, admin portals and internal tools to optimize your operations.

items.title: Web applications
items.desc: SaaS platforms, marketplaces, intranets and any web app your company needs.

items.title: APIs & integrations
items.desc: We connect your existing systems with third parties: payment gateways, ERPs, external services.

items.title: Mobile apps
items.desc: Native and hybrid apps for iOS and Android focused on user experience.

items.title: Automations
items.desc: Reduce manual work with automated workflows, bots and smart processes.

items.title: Technical consulting
items.desc: Software architecture, code review and advisory for technical teams.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We understand your problem, processes and goals before writing a line of code.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: We present a clear technical proposal with scope, technologies and time estimates.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Short iterations with frequent demos. You see progress and can give feedback at any time.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Production deploy, documentation and team training so everything works from day one.

steps.title: Support
steps.desc: Ongoing maintenance, bug fixes and system evolution according to your needs.

cta.title: Tell us about your project
cta.subtitle: Consultation is free. We'll reply in under 24 hours.
